title: The Alliance Takes Shape
description: Pages 6–10 focus on the alliance takes shape, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #4, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #5 as the Colosseum fighters choose to help Luffy, and the rebellion turns into a race to reach Doflamingo before the country is crushed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Here it is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Viola! AH!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Gyaaaahh Viola-SAMA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What is it?

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: The key, father! The key to Trafalgar Law's hand- cuffs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I finally found it... now we've gotta get it to him, somehow...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wait, Viola. Who do you think those guys are!? They're pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Right! Those outlaws are the only ones capable of shattering this country's facade of peace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Father ...I have placed my hopes in them!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: At the hands of the pirate whom the world government gave a title and this very country, Doflamingo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We have been made to suffer so!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: I have no wish to be saved by the Marines or the government and the "justice" they tout!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They cannot hear them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The cries of the fallen they themselves have inflicted!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: This country's angry cries!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The ears of those in power listen only when it is convenient!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: At least the straw hats' words are sincere!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Their hearts and hands move together!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I promise you I'll kick Doflamingo's ass!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Promise me you won't leave my friends' side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: King Riku, please, take a look at this man!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: You're... that 5-star...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: usoland, also known as God usopp!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: This man, with no regard for his own safety,

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Broke the "toy curse" that has plagued this country for over a decade! He is our hero!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: His heroic figure is enough to make us weep!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: And Luffy- Land is this super hero's captain!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: King Riku, the straw Hatland crew (or usolanders) are Dressrosa's beacon of hope!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Though they may be pirates, we will follow them to our last!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Viola! I'll take that key to Lucy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: As it stands, I can't simply sit idly by here waiting...

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Right, right! Let's do it! If yer gonna go to where Luffy-senpai is, Lemme go with you! You can count on me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Rebecca, if you go down there,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: The prisoners of this game won't let you off easily!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I'll be fine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: If that's the case, then let us go over the roofs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Princess Viola, Kabu and myself shall accompany her. Do not fear!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Over the roofs?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: inhel, can I leave the factory to you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: clang

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: No problem! It seems the factory is a bit understaffed at the moment! With Finland, we'll...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Go save Princess Ma Cherie and our friends and bring everyone back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Got it! See you soon! We can't be dawdling around!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Let us promise to meet up again at this Royal Plateau!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Franky's side

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Right...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: I've made it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Hurry up and get lost, ya doors!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Hmm NNN ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: "Radical"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Just for the record, those doors...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Ain't gonna budge an inch with an attack like that.

summary: The Alliance Takes Shape develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
